# Blog Template

**File:** `templates/blog.json`

The blog template displays a list of articles with configurable layouts (default, cards, compact, masonry).

## Variants

- `blog.json` - Default layout
- `blog.cards.json` - Card grid layout
- `blog.compact.json` - Compact list layout
- `blog.masonry.json` - Masonry grid layout

## Features

- ✅ Multiple layout options
- ✅ Article cards with images
- ✅ Pagination
- ✅ RSS feed link
- ✅ Tag filtering
- ✅ Search integration

- [Article Template](./templates-article) - Single blog post
